label: arrival at an empty house
text: Sarah got to the house. It was empty. Nobody had lived there for a long time. She went inside and looked around. The furniture was covered in white sheets. She felt sad about it. She decided to stay the night anyway.

label: waiting for news
text: The man sat in the hospital waiting room. He was very nervous. He kept checking the clock on the wall. A nurse came out, but she was looking for someone else. He did not know how long he would have to wait. He wished that somebody would just come and tell him something.

label: a storm at sea
text: The boat got caught in a storm. The waves were really big and the wind was loud. The crew were scared. The captain tried to keep the boat steady and pointed into the waves. Water kept coming over the side. They worked hard all night long. By the morning the storm had passed and everyone was safe.
